businessSummary.oneLiner: World's largest EV maker evolving into a 'Physical AI Platform' spanning autonomous driving, robotics, energy, and AI chips
businessSummary.description: Tesla is transitioning from EV manufacturing to an integrated AI/robotics/energy platform. FY2025 revenue $94.8B (-2.9% YoY), net income $3.79B (-46.5% YoY). Friday close $391.20 (-0.96%). Musk announced Terafab AI chip fab project launching in 7 days (3/14) — Tesla's self-manufactured AI chip era begins. Optimus 3 robot production starting this summer. Tesla-xAI joint 'Macrohard (Digital Optimus)' project and xAI→SpaceX equity conversion accelerating Musk ecosystem integration.
howTheyMakeMoney: Services & charging (Supercharger network, insurance, OTA upgrades)

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extremely high valuation. Based on EPS $1.08. Reflects future AI/robotics premium

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2026 EPS improvement expected but still sector-highest level

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2025 negative growth. Third consecutive year of delivery decline concerns

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Margin compression from price competition continues

keyMetrics.name: ROE
keyMetrics.interpretation: Low return on equity vs. large tech peers

growthDrivers.title: Terafab AI Chip Fab Project — Launch in 7 Days
growthDrivers.description: Reuters (3/14): Musk announced Tesla's Terafab project launching in 7 days. AI5 chip self-manufacturing facility marking Tesla's AI hardware self-sufficiency era. Small-batch production 2026 → volume production 2027.

growthDrivers.title: Optimus 3 Robot — Production Starting This Summer
growthDrivers.description: Teslarati (3/14): Musk confirmed Optimus 3 robot slow production starting this summer. S-curve manufacturing ramp-up. Plans to release new design every year. Volume production target 2027.

growthDrivers.title: Tesla-xAI Joint 'Macrohard (Digital Optimus)' Project Unveiled
growthDrivers.description: Reuters (3/11): Musk unveiled joint Tesla-xAI project 'Macrohard' targeting software market disruption. xAI investment converted to SpaceX equity — Musk ecosystem synergy formalized ahead of SpaceX IPO.

growthDrivers.title: China February Sales Surge 91% — 4 Consecutive Months of Growth
growthDrivers.description: Reuters (3/11): Tesla China-made EV sales surged 91% YoY in February. Low base effect from last year, but 4 consecutive months of growth. Recovery signal vs. BYD.

growthDrivers.title: Battery Business Is the Real Growth Story — Forbes Analysis
growthDrivers.description: Forbes (3/12): 'Tesla's best growth story isn't robotaxis — it's batteries.' Megapack demand explosion, energy segment as key offset to auto margin decline.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: US EV market 50%+ share leader. Software/manufacturing/energy/FSD 8.2B miles vertical integration is the core moat. Terafab adds AI chip self-sufficiency. xAI/SpaceX connection expands Musk ecosystem.

moats.description: FSD 8.2 billion miles of driving data. Overwhelmingly more training data than competitors.
In-house battery (4680), custom chips (HW4→AI5 Terafab), software (FSD), charging infrastructure (Supercharger).
NACS is North American EV charging standard. GM, Ford, Rivian depend on Tesla Superchargers.

competitors.name: BYD
competitors.detail: Global EV sales #1. Strong price competitiveness. Dominant in China

recentNews.headline: Musk Announces Tesla Terafab AI Chip Fab Project Launch in 7 Days
recentNews.significance: Tesla's self-manufactured AI chip (AI5) facility. Reduces NVIDIA dependency. Volume production target 2027

recentNews.headline: Optimus 3 Robot Production Starting This Summer — Annual Design Refresh Planned
recentNews.significance: Humanoid robot commercialization materializing. S-curve manufacturing ramp. Volume production 2027

recentNews.headline: Tesla Converts xAI Investment into SpaceX Stake — Government Approved
recentNews.significance: Musk inter-company financial linkage formalized ahead of SpaceX IPO. Indirect SpaceX exposure for Tesla shareholders

recentNews.headline: Musk Unveils Joint Tesla-xAI 'Macrohard (Digital Optimus)' — Software Disruption
recentNews.significance: Entry into AI software market. Tesla's AI strategy crystallized

recentNews.headline: Tesla China February Sales Surge 91% YoY — 4 Consecutive Months Up
recentNews.significance: China market recovery signal. Low base effect but positive trend

analystOpinions.notableComment: 31 analysts with Hold consensus. TipRanks avg $399.25, MarketBeat $406.84. Bulls target up to $600, but overall consensus at current price level.

risks.title: Potential Third Consecutive Year of Delivery Decline
risks.description: Reuters: Investors and analysts cutting FY2026 delivery estimates. Risk of further revenue/profit decline.

risks.title: Extreme Valuation — P/E 387x
risks.description: TTM P/E 387x, Forward P/E 189x. Multiple could collapse sharply if growth slows.

risks.title: NHTSA FSD Investigation — Regulatory Risk
risks.description: Economic Times (3/9): NHTSA investigating FSD vehicles. March 9 data submission deadline. Tighter regulation could delay autonomous driving monetization.

risks.title: Musk Leadership Dispersion
risks.description: Simultaneously running Tesla, xAI, SpaceX, X (Twitter), DOGE. CEO focus concerns persist.

risks.title: Intensifying Global EV Competition
risks.description: BYD and Chinese EV makers' price competitiveness. Market share losses in Europe and Southeast Asia.

buyReasons.title: Terafab AI Chip Self-Manufacturing — Vertical Integration Complete
buyReasons.rationale: AI5 chip self-production reduces NVIDIA dependency. AI hardware cost savings + supply security. Accelerates transformation into AI infrastructure company.

buyReasons.title: Optimus 3 Commercialization — Dawn of Robot Era
buyReasons.rationale: Production starting this summer, volume production 2027. Success unlocks $12T+ robot TAM. Annual new design refresh planned.

buyReasons.title: xAI/SpaceX Ecosystem Integration — New Value Creation
buyReasons.rationale: Macrohard project + SpaceX equity conversion materializes Musk ecosystem synergy. Tesla stock evolves into AI/space combo play.

buyReasons.title: Battery/Energy Business — Second Growth Engine
buyReasons.rationale: Megapack demand explosion, high-growth energy segment. New revenue stream offsetting auto margin decline.

overallOpinion: Tesla faces real challenges with negative revenue growth (-2.9%) and margin compression (operating margin 4.6%), yet is simultaneously pursuing Terafab AI chip self-manufacturing + Optimus 3 robot commercialization + xAI/SpaceX integration as powerful future growth pillars.
P/E 387x includes AI/robotics/energy/chip 'platform premium,' but if third consecutive delivery decline materializes, multiple could adjust sharply.
Terafab launch (~3/21) and GTC 2026 (3/16) are near-term catalysts. NHTSA FSD investigation is a concern. Hold at current levels; aggressive buy opportunity below $350.

investmentVerdict.summary: Valuation burden vs. Terafab/Optimus/platform transition expectations at equilibrium. Need to confirm tangible progress after Terafab launch.

sources.name: Reuters
sources.description: Terafab AI chip fab project launch announcement

sources.name: Teslarati
sources.description: Digital Optimus and Optimus 3 production details

threads.hook: Tesla is making its own AI chips now 🏭
threads.text:
Musk: Terafab AI chip fab launching in 7 days.

Optimus 3 production this summer. AI chips + robots + FSD = vertical integration complete.

But P/E 387x, 3rd year of delivery decline looming.

$391 — buying the future or buying the dream? 👉 investory.kro.kr/stock/TSLA/analysis/2026-03-15
